medialive.channel.scte35spliceinsert.Cfn:
The setup of SCTE-35 splice insert handling.

The parent of this entity is AvailSettings.

medialive.channel.scte35spliceinsert.AdA.Description: When specified, this offset (in milliseconds) is added to the input ad avail PTS time. This applies only to embedded SCTE 104/35 messages. It doesn't apply to OOB messages.

medialive.channel.scte35spliceinsert.NoR.Description: When set to ignore, segment descriptors with noRegionalBlackoutFlag set to 0 no longer trigger blackouts or ad avail slates.

medialive.channel.scte35spliceinsert.Web.Description: When set to ignore, segment descriptors with webDeliveryAllowedFlag set to 0 no longer trigger blackouts or ad avail slates.
